name: Rice with Black Beans and Corn
recipeIngredient: 1 (4.5 oz) can Chopped green chiles, drained
1 (10 oz) pack Frozen whole-kernel corn, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 1 cup water to a boil in a medium saucepan.
2. Stir in long-grain rice. Cover and reduce heat. Simmer for 20 minutes or until the rice is tender and the liquid is absorbed.
3. Stir in plum tomato, chopped green chiles, black beans, corn, chopped green onions, and chopped fresh cilantro.
4. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture is thoroughly heated.
